---
title: "Mateo Mori"
image: media/headshot.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/samanthacsik/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/samanthacsik
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:scsik@ucsb.edu
---
        
# page content excluded for brevity ~
---

Hello! I am an environmental science data science and statistics student interested in visualizing the world through R, by learning how websites are made. I enjoy playing water polo, surfing, scuba diving, and backpacking.
